name: compliance auto-refresh: paywalled:true frameworks get HEAD-only check (etag/last-modified compare); body not downloaded
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch && echo "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z" > .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch/iso-27001-a14.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/auto-refresh-daily.sh" --framework-id iso-27001-a14 --paywalled --upstream-stub "$PWD/upstream.sh" --now 2026-05-13T08:00:00Z 2>out.txt && grep -E "HEAD" out.txt 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
